title: Cadence gate signal
description: The ONLY thing a gate returns to the orchestrator — a signal, never the full log. The window stays bounded regardless of build output size.

reason.description: pass = green; gate = the code genuinely failed the check; error = the gate could not run/parse/timed out (a CONFIG problem, not a code problem) — both gate and error are pass:false (fail closed) but the orchestrator treats them differently
